description:
PowerEssentials Nukkit

The ultimate Nukkit plugin to streamline server management and enhance gameplay.

--- ## ✨ Features - **Custom language support**: Localize your server effortlessly. - **Full Configuration**: Customize the plugin's behavior. - **Command control**: Enable or disable commands as needed. - **Gamemode on join**: Automatically set players' gamemode. - **Anti-namespace protection**: Prevent unauthorized namespace usage. - **One Player Sleep**: Allow only one player to sleep in a world. --- ## 📜 Commands | Command | Description | Status | | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ | | `/hub`, `/lobby`, `/setlobby` | Set and teleport to the lobby. | ✅ | | `/gmc [player]`, `/gms [player]`, `/gmspc [player]`, `/gma [player]` | Change gamemode for yourself or others. | ✅ | | `/fly [player]` | Enable or disable flying for yourself or others. | ✅ | | `/fperm ` | Retrieve plugin permission info. | ✅ | | `/nickname [player]` | Change your or another player's nickname. | ⌛ | | `/banitem [world]`, `/unbanitem [world]`, `/banitemlist [world]` | Ban specific items in a world. | ⌛ | | `/tpa ` | Request to teleport to another player. | ⌛ | | `/rtp`, `/randomteleport` | Randomly teleport to a world (Anti Water Area). | ⌛ | | `/home [name]`, `/sethome `, `/delhome ` | Manage homes for players. | ✅ | | `/warp [name]`, `/addwarp `, `/delwarp ` | Create and teleport to warps. | ⌛ | | `/heal [name]`, `/feed [name]` | Heal or feed yourself or another player. | ✅ | | `/vanish [player]`, `/vanishlist` | Toggle vanish mode. | ⌛ | | `/sudo ` | Execute a command or send a message as another player. | ⌛ | | `/size ` | Change player size. | ⌛ | | `/afk` | Mark yourself as AFK. | ⌛ | | `/coordinates` | Display current coordinates. | ⌛ | | `/bless [player]` | Clear bad effects. | ⌛ | | `/repair [player]` | Repair items. | ⌛ | | `/itemid` | View the ID of the item in hand. | ⌛ | | `/getpos ` | Get the position of a player. | ⌛ | | `/senditem [amount]` | Transfer an item to another player. | ⌛ | | `/kickall [reason]` | Kick all players with an optional reason. | ⌛ | | `/tpall [player]` | Teleport all players to a target player. | ⌛ | | `/worldprotect [world]` | Protect worlds with various settings (place, PvP, hunger, etc.). | ⌛ | | `/mute [reason]`, `/unmute [player]` | Mute Player. | ⌛ | | `/tempban [reason]` | Banned players with time. | ⌛ | | `/bancommand [world]` | Banned command on specific world. | ⌛ | | `/lightning [player]` | Send lightning. | ⌛ | | `/staffchat` | Entering staff chat mode. | ⌛ | | `/walkspeed ` | Walkspeed. | ⌛ | | `/flyspeed ` | Flyspeed. | ⌛ | | `/renameitem ` | Rename the item on your hand. | ⌛ | | `/itemlore ` | Set lore the item on your hand, (`use {line} to create new line`). | ⌛ | | `/enchants []` | enchant lots of items in your hand, (`/enchants unbreaking:2 thorns:1 vampire:1`). | ⌛ | | `/pvptoggle` | On/Off your pvp mode. | ⌛ | | `/antitp` | Anti Teleport. | ⌛ | | `/nightvision` | Night Vision mode. | ⌛ | --- ## 📂 Installation 1. Download the latest release from the [releases page](https://github.com/PowerEssentials/PowerEssentials-Nukkit/releases). 2. Place the `PowerEssentials.jar` file into your server's `plugins` folder. 3. Restart your server. ### Download For PocketMine-MP If you use PocketMine-MP, you can download it from the following link: [releases page](https://github.com/PowerEssentials/PowerEssentials/releases). ### Download For Bukkit/Spigot/Paper If you use Bukkit/Spigot/Paper, you can download it from the following link: [releases page](https://github.com/PowerEssentials/PowerEssentials-Bukkit/releases). --- ## 🌐 Localization **PowerEssentials** supports multiple languages. Contributions for new translations are welcome! --- ## 🛠️ Contribution We welcome contributions! Feel free to open issues or submit pull requests to help improve PowerEssentials. --- ## 🔗 Links - [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/PowerEssentials/PowerEssentials-Nukkit) --- ## 📜 Credits Icon from [Flaticon](https://www.flaticon.com/) --- ## 📜 License PowerEssentials is licensed under the [MIT License](https://github.com/PowerEssentials/PowerEssentials-Nukkit/blob/stable/LICENSE).
name: PowerEssentials
